w2c:box1.label: Wages, tips, other comp. (corrected)
w2c:box1.so: Kani waa sanduuq muujinaya labadaba: lacagtii markii hore lagu sheegay iyo tan saxda ah ee cusub. Haddii aad horay u soo gudbisay canshuurtaada adigoo isticmaalaya W-2-gii hore, waxaa laga yaabaa inaad u baahato inaad dib u gudbiso adigoo isticmaalaya tirooyinka saxda ah.
w2c:box1.en: This box shows both the amount that was originally reported and the corrected amount. If you already filed your taxes using your old W-2, you may need to refile using these corrected numbers.

w2c:box2.label: Federal income tax withheld (corrected)
w2c:box2.so: Kani waa sanduuq muujinaya lacagtii canshuurta federaalka ee horay laga jaray iyo tan saxda ah ee cusub. Tan waxay kaa caawin kartaa inaad ogaato haddii canshuurta lagaa jaray ay sax tahay.
w2c:box2.en: This box shows the federal tax withheld amount that was originally reported and the corrected amount, so you can check whether the right amount was taken out.

w2c:box3.label: Social security wages (corrected)
w2c:box3.soTitle: Social Security mushaharka oo la saxay
w2c:box3.so: Kani waa qaybta mushaharkaaga ee loo xisaabiyo Social Security, saxda ah ee cusub. Haddii tirooyinka iska beddelsan, waxaa laga yaabaa inaad u baahato inaad iska beddelso canshuurtaada Social Security.
w2c:box3.en: This is the corrected Social Security wages. If this number changed, you may need to adjust your tax filing.

w2c:box4.label: Social security tax withheld (corrected)
w2c:box4.soTitle: Social Security canshuurta oo la saxay
w2c:box4.so: Kani waa lacagta canshuurta Social Security ee saxda ah ee cusub. Haddii aad horay u soo gudbisay canshuurtaada, waxaa laga yaabaa inaad u baahato inaad iska beddelso.
w2c:box4.en: This is the corrected Social Security tax amount. You may need to adjust your tax filing if this changed.

w2c:box5.label: Medicare wages & tips (corrected)
w2c:box5.so: Kani waa qaybta mushaharkaaga ee loo xisaabiyo Medicare, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box5.en: This is the corrected Medicare wages amount.

w2c:box6.label: Medicare tax withheld (corrected)
w2c:box6.so: Kani waa lacagta canshuurta Medicare ee saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box6.en: This is the corrected Medicare tax amount.

w2c:box7.label: Social security tips (corrected)
w2c:box7.soTitle: Tips-ka Social Security oo la saxay
w2c:box7.so: Kani waa qaybta khadarkaaga (tips) ee loo xisaabiyo Social Security, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box7.en: This is the corrected Social Security tips amount.

w2c:box8.label: Allocated tips (corrected)
w2c:box8.soTitle: Tips-ka la qaybiyay oo la saxay
w2c:box8.so: Kani waa khadarka (tips) loo-shaqeeyahaagu kuu qoondeeyay, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box8.en: This is the corrected allocated tips amount.

w2c:box10.label: Dependent care benefits (corrected)
w2c:box10.soTitle: Faa'iidada daryeelka carruurta oo la saxay
w2c:box10.so: Kani waa lacagta daryeelka carruurta, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box10.en: This is the corrected dependent care benefits amount.

w2c:box11.label: Nonqualified plans (corrected)
w2c:box11.soTitle: Qorshooyinka aan caadiga ahayn oo la saxay
w2c:box11.so: Kani waa lacagta qorshaha hawlgabka aan caadiga ahayn, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box11.en: This is the corrected nonqualified plans amount.

w2c:box14.label: Other (corrected)
w2c:box14.so: Kani waa qiimaha saxda ah ee cusub ee sanduuqa "Other".
w2c:box14.en: This is the corrected amount for the "Other" box.

w2c:box15.label: State & employer's state ID (corrected)
w2c:box15.soTitle: Stateka & lambarka shirkadda oo la saxay
w2c:box15.so: Kani waa stateka iyo lambarka shirkadda, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box15.en: This is the corrected state and employer's state ID.

w2c:box16.label: State wages, tips, etc. (corrected)
w2c:box16.so: Kani waa mushaharka stateka, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box16.en: This is the corrected state wages amount.

w2c:box17.label: State income tax withheld (corrected)
w2c:box17.so: Kani waa canshuurta stateka, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box17.en: This is the corrected state income tax amount.

w2c:box18.label: Local wages, tips, etc. (corrected)
w2c:box18.so: Kani waa mushaharka degmada, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box18.en: This is the corrected local wages amount.

w2c:box19.label: Local income tax withheld (corrected)
w2c:box19.so: Kani waa canshuurta degmada, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box19.en: This is the corrected local income tax amount.

w2c:box20.label: Locality name (corrected)
w2c:box20.so: Kani waa magaca degmada, saxda ah ee cusub.
w2c:box20.en: This is the corrected locality name.
